subcodes.first_line: O ye steadfast ones, O ye sincere ones! Your blessed names were written in the letter of his holiness, the spiritual namesake of 'Abdu'l-Bahá [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان ای صادقان نامهای مبارک شما در نامه حضرت سمی معنوی عبدالبهاء مرقوم و
subcodes.subjects: @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @thankfulness; gratitude, @Manifestation of God as sun
